# CLAUDE.md (legacy)

This file is kept for backwards-compatible links from older commits and READMEs.
The current Claude Code project guide lives at the repository root: [`/CLAUDE.md`](../../CLAUDE.md).

It covers:

- Monorepo layout (`packages/`, `apps/`, `extensions/`)
- Commands (`pnpm install`, `pnpm turbo run build`, single-workspace filters)
- Architecture (parser pipeline, AST, renderers, styles)
- VS Code extension dev workflow
- Build, release, and publishing process

Use the root `CLAUDE.md`. Anything in this directory other than `markdown-mockup-project-plan.md`, `LIVE_PREVIEW_GUIDE.md`, `FIGMA_EXPORT_INVESTIGATION.md`, and `syntax-research.md` is a historical artefact.
